notes: v1.14.106 - Unified card recipe across the New UI (CSS-only, John dialed on-device). Every redesign card now = pure-dark surface (linear-gradient #0a0d13->#070809, NO accent in the fill) + crisp accent border (color-mix accent 36%) + subtle inset glow (inset 0 0 26px -4px accent 14%) + filter:saturate(1.40), radius 16px, no halo. Applied to .rf-card (Ref + Work grids; removed the v1.14.103 white-top glassy fill + the ::after radial; brackets hidden via body.rd .rf-cnr{display:none}), #pg-cmd .lens (cyan), .stat (cyan), .lbtn launchers (cyan), and .nba (magenta, hero-bumped to border 42% / inset glow 20% so it still reads as the Next-Best-Action hero). Saturation is uniform so Ref/Work icons no longer out-pop Command. CSS-only - no markup/logic/routes changed; all body.rd-gated; legacy .qa-btn + legacy pages untouched. Supersedes the separate 2-corner-bracket handoff (not run).
